ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "code_region" TEXT /* Code assigned to the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Full name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Geographic area of the region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "code_sector" TEXT /* Code assigned to the sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of the sector (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gva_data" (
  "gva_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GVA record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which GVA is measured */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector for which GVA is measured */,
  "gva_year" INTEGER /* Year of the GVA measurement */,
  "gva_value" REAL /* Value of GVA in the specified year */,
  "gva_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of GVA compared to the previous year */,
  "gva_inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of GVA in the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gva_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gva_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "total_gva" REAL /* Total GVA over the years */,
  "average_gva" REAL /* Average GVA over the years */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Year-on-year growth rate for GVA */,
  "sector_contribution" REAL /* Contribution of the sector to the regional GVA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_summary_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_summary_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user’s login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user’s login */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user’s last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., report, data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gva_growth_rates" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the growth rate is calculated */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of GVA compared to the previous year */,
  "average_annual_growth" REAL /* Average annual growth rate of GVA over the years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_growth_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_growth_rates_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gva_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gva_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "trend_year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the GVA trend */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gva_trends_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the performance is calculated */,
  "performance_index" REAL /* Performance index of the sector (e.g., productivity, efficiency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_performance_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economy record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economy indicators are calculated */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_economy_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
